episode_title: KT #767 - ARI SHAFFIR - LUIS J GOMEZ - PEYTON RUDDY

bits.premise: Brown immigrant parents reveal their expectations by naming their children after careers and outcomes.
His claimed sobriety is really abstaining from saying a racial slur.
A crowd-participation knock-knock joke about his cat stalls before reaching the punchline.

lines.text: - So my name is Surjan.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I don't know if you guys can tell by looking at me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but my parents are brown immigrants.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And my mom, she wanted me to be a doctor so bad,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: she named me Surjan.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: It's fucked up, I know so much pressure.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Imagine being named after a job.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But my name's kind of cool.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My siblings, they got it so much worse.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My older brother, his name is Engineer.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah, and he grew up to be an engineer
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause he's a suck up.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But my little sister, she has the worst name.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I feel so bad for her.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They didn't really believe in her that much,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: so they named her Abortion.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Just to get real for a second,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I don't know if you guys are still doing
lines.label: setup

lines.text: your New Year's resolution,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but as of today, I'm officially four months sober.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Thank you, thank you.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's been four months since I last said the N word.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah, staying strong, staying strong.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And for my last joke, I need you guys to play along with me.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: You know how this goes?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Knock, knock.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My cat.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Leo.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Oh, I was, I was hoping I was at a minute,
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: but I didn't get it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I sped through it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I sped through it.
lines.label: fluff
